faqs.question: What spider species are common in Rochdale Village apartments?
faqs.answer: Rochdale Village residents commonly encounter house spiders, cellar spiders, and occasionally wolf spiders, especially in ground-floor units and basement storage areas. Our $350-$550 treatment targets all common species found in Queens cooperative housing communities.

faqs.question: Do you treat common areas in Rochdale Village buildings?
